raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle the week","name":"Before we get into specifics, what feels most worth talking through today?","description":"Safe opener that lets Nina set the agenda without implying a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load after sprint","name":"Now that the sprint pressure has eased, what is still driving the load on your week?","description":"Separates temporary sprint effort from the current source of sustained workload.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late-night residue","name":"What's still carrying over from those late nights?","description":"Checks whether the intense push has fully cleared or is still affecting her pace.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where does your work feel least visible right now?","description":"Surfaces the specific moments or channels where Nina feels unseen.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence point","name":"Where do you feel you have the least influence on the outcome?","description":"Finds the decision points or dependencies that make her execution feel constrained.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition signal","name":"What would make your wins feel properly seen here?","description":"Gets concrete about the kind of recognition or acknowledgement that actually matters to her.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority trade-off","name":"What are you choosing not to do over the next two weeks?","description":"Forces a real trade-off behind her stated priorities and exposes hidden overload.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support asked for","name":"What do you want from me that would actually change your week?","description":"Clarifies the manager support Nina wants in practical terms, not vague reassurance.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision friction","name":"What's the one decision or dependency that would most help you move faster?","description":"Pins down the highest-leverage unblocker without reopening a general blocker scan.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete near-term commitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
